base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of intro_text_scroll_mission_briefing — a ui (cutscene) from 1986 metroid. Mission-briefing scrolling text — 'DESTROY THE METROIDS...'. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mission-briefing scrolling text — 'DESTROY THE METROIDS...'; Samus's assignment detailed on intro screens
